---
title: "The Rev. Sydney Malet Scroggs"
---

## The Rev. Sydney Malet Scroggs

**Dates:** (1824/5-1893)

### Description

curate of Kingsteignton

### Biography

He was one of the six former curates of Keble who carried his coffin.  He is listed in the 1861 census as curate of Pitt.  He is listed in the 1871 census as curate of Kingsteignton, Devon.  He married Emma Frances Stephens (1824/5-1876) in 1858.

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
